creator: joe@eshu.net
text:
On a system tracking RELENG_7, upgraded via build world, build kernel, install world, just 36 hours ago, with the privoxy-3.0.11 port fetched with portsnap and built with portupgrade this AM, invoking /usr/local/etc/rc.d/privoxy forcestart, fails when initgroups() is invoked:

[root@elegba ~]# /usr/local/etc/rc.d/privoxy forcestart
Starting privoxy.
Feb 26 10:37:59.340 28301100 Info: Privoxy version 3.0.11
Feb 26 10:37:59.341 28301100 Info: Program name: /usr/local/sbin/privoxy
Feb 26 10:37:59.357 28301100 Fatal error: initgroups() failed: Operation not permitted

The only place I could find initgroups() was in jcc.c, line 3902, but I didn't dig around any further.

How-To-Repeat: invoke /usr/local/etc/rc.d/privoxy forcestart or reboot to indirectly invoke /usr/local/etc/rc.d/privoxy start
